title: PermitGraph Dashboard
visualThesis: Calm security-control software that makes permit state, evidence, risk paths, and remediation decisions immediately legible without alarmist decoration.

referenceLock.primary: Existing PermitGraph dashboard tokens and deterministic evidence-review workflow
preserve: Distinct approved, review, blocked, critical, agent, and artifact semantics
borrow: Security operations patterns from real control-plane interfaces
roleRules: Permit colors communicate deterministic status only
Risk emphasis must remain subordinate to evidence and remediation
Use Phosphor icons for product actions
reject: Model prose presented as deterministic finding state
referenceLock.mediaStrategy: Prefer graph paths, proof-pack artifacts, and real scanner output over decorative illustration.

forbiddenPatterns: Raw colors outside canonical token definitions
Target repository code execution during validation
